# Support

For bug reports or project discussion, use this repository's normal issue flow when issues are enabled.

For paid engineering review or setup support related to this repository, use:

- Offer: Edge Camera RTSP Integration Review
- Sample deliverable or proof: https://x2.brucelu.top/edgecam/sample/
- Ask a pre-sales question: https://x2.brucelu.top/products/contact/?offer=edgecam&source=github-support-yolo-rtsp-object-detection-rtmp
- Checkout: https://x2.brucelu.top/edgecam/checkout/?source=github-support-yolo-rtsp-object-detection-rtmp

Boundary: paid support is engineering review, setup help, or architecture guidance. It does not include guaranteed revenue, guaranteed trading profit, credential-managed services, regulatory approval, or changes to third-party products.
